name: Mixtral 8x7B
parameter_count: 46.7B total (12.9B active per token, 8 experts with top-2 routing)
training_approach: Pretraining on multilingual web data with sparse MoE routing
key_innovations: Proved that sparse MoE could work at practical scale with open weights
Matched or exceeded GPT-3.5 and LLaMA 2 70B while using only 12.9B active parameters
Efficient inference — runs at the speed of a 13B model while having 47B total parameters
cultural_impact: Mixtral demonstrated that mixture-of-experts architectures could deliver frontier performance with dramatically lower inference costs. Released by the French startup Mistral AI, it challenged the US-centric AI landscape and showed that a small European team could compete with much larger organizations. The model became a popular choice for cost-effective AI deployment.
